subject: fix(layout): distinguish selected image cells in Structure grid
body:
Image cells and structure-selected cells both used bg-primary, making
them visually identical. Now selected image cells use a darker violet
shade and show a checkmark alongside the camera emoji, so users can
tell when they've selected an image cell for editing.

Tags: layout, ui, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
